entity.summary: Developer-focused decentralized exchange aggregator providing simulated quotes, smart-order routing, and executable swap transactions across EVM networks through a unified API.
entity.notes: Current first-party website exposes an active multi-network swap API with smart-order routing and simulated execution. Current independent metrics report non-zero DEX aggregator volume. No exact launch date, legal entity, or jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: Nordstern official swap API overview
evidence.notes: First-party website describes a DEX aggregator and swap API that scans liquidity pools, simulates routes, and returns executable swap transactions across EVM networks.

evidence.title: Nordstern.Finance DEX aggregator metrics
evidence.notes: Current independent protocol metrics classify Nordstern.Finance as a DEX aggregator and report non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, 30-day, and cumulative routed swap volume.
